title: BetterChat
description: Let's you hide specific types of chat messages, such as player messages
body:
This mod let's you easily **disable all kinds of chat messages**, like _player_ chat messages, _system_ chat messages and more.
This is useful on big servers like **DonutSMP** etc which have **very active chats** in which you may want to hide all player messages, or just block all messages with "tpa", **without losing the ability to chat yourself and use commands**. It also lets you block specific keywords in messages using **RegEx**

**IMPORTANT**: Player messages may (for some reason) not always be blocked. For some reason they get treated as system messages instead of player messages.

Please help translate this project on Crowdin -> https://crowdin.com/project/betterchat
